description: Locale conventions for the United States market. Configures date formats (MM/DD/YYYY), currency (USD — US Dollar), address formatting (US postal conventions), number formatting (period decimal, comma thousands), and measurement units (imperial/US customary with metric for clinical) appropriate for US healthcare facilities.

configurationKeys.description: Date display format for US locale (MM/DD/YYYY).
Number formatting conventions for US locale.

capabilityContributions.description: US locale conventions required for correct date, currency, and number display in United States market tenants.
